name: Hushward Rod
sigNote: SHELVED 2026-06-10 (code dormant, config removed): SIGNATURE "Unbroken Chant" (support grant, Signatures/GrowthEngine HoldSignature path) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3 the wielder gains Swiftspell (support 226, +0x98 byte 3 mask 0x08), OR-set + held each tick; stacks with the player's own support pick; released (AND-cleared) if the rod leaves the wielder's hands mid-battle, never stripping a player-picked Swiftspell. name: Umbral Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Spiritual Font" (runtime-written restore, SpiritualFont.cs). TRIGGER HISTORY (4 failures): (1) Global TurnTracker acted-edge -- cursor-following struct mis-credited edges. (2) Band +0x25 ACtSlam CT -- write-only, zero transitions observed live. (3) Band +0x09 ACtTurn CT -- never reached >=90 across full player turns. (4) Actor latch rising edge -- fired for action 1, then the second player action produced NO latch line, NO turn line -- global Acted flag pulses unreliably (documented trap). CURRENT TRIGGER: position-poll MoveWatch (SpiritualFont.Policy.cs). Each tick (inLive, active, located): read gx/gy from the first located band entry. First sighting baselines silently. New tile must be stable 3 consecutive ticks (filters animation flicker and (0,0)-band pulses). Rate-capped 90 ticks (~3 s) after each fire. Move-only turns NOW PAY (old gap closed). Knockback/teleport also pays (intended). On fire: HP += round(maxHP*10%); MP += round(maxMP*10%). Band +0x18/+0x1A LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-10. Per-battle layout validation retained as sanity guard. SHELVED on this row: Life Sap (LifeSap.cs) dormant; see branch shelved-rod-signatures.

name: Dragon Rod
sigNote: SHELVED 2026-06-10 (code dormant, config removed): SIGNATURE "Wyrmblood" (customRuntime, Wyrmblood.cs) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3, at each wielder COMPLETED-turn edge (TurnTracker rising-Acted: the heal lands as the wielder finishes acting, adjacency from the post-move tile — not pre-move like vanilla Regen), the wielder AND every ALLY within 1 Manhattan tile heal their OWN maxHP/8 (Tuning.WyrmbloodDiv = vanilla Regen rate), clamped at full. EMULATED regen — the Regen status bit is unmapped, never touched; guarded HP writes on the authoritative band entries. Allies positively identified (static-array player-slot fingerprints — never enemies); dead never healed; one heal per fingerprint per splash. Each splash dev-logged. p3Desc: 'The wielder regenerates each turn, and the warmth mends adjacent allies.' Name 'Dragonheart' FORBIDDEN (Dragoon reaction collision). Replaces the DRAFT Regenerate stack with the same fantasy in buildable form.

name: Rod of Faith
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Rapture" (customRuntime, Rapture.cs) — REWORKED 2026-06-10: the 3-turn cap is RETIRED (the band CT it read, +0x25 = ExtraTurn's WRITE target, never ticked live; recovery release player-verified same session). Now: when the +3 wielder's HP drops below 30% of max (Tuning.RaptureHpPct), Master Teleportation (movement 243 = ability.en key 499; Tuning.RaptureMoveId) REPLACES the movement field (band +0x80, 3 bytes) and is HELD UNTIL THE WIELDER RECOVERS to/above the threshold — no turn count. Recovery IS the hysteresis: the next drop below threshold arms a fresh window. Maim's save-once/hold/restore discipline + never-re-save invariant intact. Restores on unequip/tier loss/wielder death (3-tick streak)/battle exit. DUAL-WIELD: no other movement-bit writer exists (the Wellspring font bits were retired for runtime writes), so the held image carries only the teleport bit. MOVEMENT 243 CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-06-10: player teleported; FULL SIGNATURE PLAYER-VERIFIED ('works flawlessly') same session; arm-time read-back (SET/MISS) still logged; fallback: flip RaptureMoveId to 242. p3Desc: 'Below a third health, the wielder gains Master Teleportation until they recover.' The glass cannon's escape hatch — holds as long as the crisis holds.
